'''Harry Rushton''' (born 13 November 2001) is an {{rlnt|Ireland}} international [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|lf|pr}} or {{rlp|sr}} forward for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]].

He previously played for the [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Super League]] and the [[Canberra Raiders]] in the [[National Rugby League|NRL]]. Rushton will join the [[Huddersfield Giants]] ahead of the 2023 Super League season.

==Background==
Rushton is of [[Irish people|Irish]] descent.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.macarthuradvertiser.com.au/story/7705606/keary-to-consider-irelands-call/ |title=Keary to consider Ireland's call |publisher=Campbelltown-Macarthur Advertiser |first=George |last=Clarke |date=20 April 2022}}</ref>

Rushton played his amateur rugby league for the Shevington Sharks.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.wigantoday.net/sport/rugby-league/shaun-wanes-wish-ex-wigan-warriors-teen-harry-rushton-3102177 |title=Shaun Wane's wish for ex-Wigan Warriors teen Harry Rushton |publisher=Wigan Today |first=Phil |last=Wilkinson |date=16 January 2021}}</ref>

==Career==
===2020===
Rushton made his Super League debut in round 14 of the [[Super League XXV results|2020 Super League season]] for Wigan against [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]], losing 42–0 against a much more experienced squad. Rushton started the match playing at {{rlp|SR}} and became Wigan Warriors' player #1107.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/article/1587/round-14-fixtures-confirmed|title=Round 14 fixtures confirmed |publisher=Sky Sports |date=22 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/wigan-vs-st-helens/teams/54569 |title=Starting Lineups - Wigan vs St Helens |publisher=Sky Sports |date=29 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/54330327 |title=Super League: Wigan vs St Helens |publisher=BBC |date=29 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/debut-a-moment-ill-never-forget-says-kai-pearce-paul/ |title=Debut a moment "I'll never forget" says Kai Pearce Paul |publisher=Love Rugby League |date=29 September 2020}}</ref>

===2021===
Rushton had joined the [[Canberra Raiders]] on a three-year deal starting from the 2021 season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://wwos.nine.com.au/nrl/the-mole-wigan-forward-harry-rushton-linked-with-move-to-canberra-raiders/d1a42f43-d8f9-4dec-a5fc-0d776f95a7b9 |title=Canberra Raiders sign young English import Harry Rushton |publisher=9 Wide World of Sports |date=24 June 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|publisher=Wigan Today|date=13 Jul 2020|accessdate=26 Dec 2020|title=Canberra Raiders have added to their English contingent with the signing of Wigan teenager Harry Rushton|url=https://www.wigantoday.net/sport/rugby-league/canberra-raiders-confirm-harry-rushton-capture-2911710}}</ref> He played 10 games in Canberra's NSW Cup team in 2021, playing six games in the second row, three at lock and one at prop - before the season was cancelled due to the COVID pandemic.

===2022===
In round 7 of the [[2022 NRL season]], Rushton made his club debut for Canberra in their 36-6 loss against [[Penrith Panthers|Penrith]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.abc.net.au/news/2022-04-24/nrl-knights-eels-panthers-raiders/100998314/|title=NRL premiers Penrith defeat Canberra 36-6, Parramatta thump Newcastle 39-2|website=www.abc.net.au}}</ref> On 12 August 2022, it was announced that Rushton would be joining [[Huddersfield Giants]] for 2023, after mutually agreeing to his release from [[Canberra Raiders]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/harry-rushton-signs-huddersfield-giants-canberra/|title=Huddersfield sign rising star Harry Rushton from Canberra}}</ref>

===2023===
Rushton played 12 games for Huddersfield in the 2023 Super League season as the club finished ninth on the table and missed the playoffs.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/ian-watson-explains-why-huddersfield-giants-underperformed-in-super-league-2023/#:~:text=HUDDERSFIELD%20GIANTS%20have%20been%20one,silverware%20once%20more%20this%20season./|title=Ian Watson explains why Huddersfield Giants underperformed in Super League 2023|website=www.totalrl.com}}</ref>

===2024===
Rushton played 22 matches for Huddersfield in the 2024 Super League season, as well as 3 in the challenge cup, which saw the club finish 9th on the table.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/huddersfield-giants-34-castleford-tigers-10-hosts-win-dead-rubber-but-2024-season-one-to-forget-for-west-yorkshire-rivals-4789784/|title=Huddersfield Giants 34 Castleford Tigers 10: Hosts win dead rubber but 2024 season one to forget for West Yorkshire rivals|website=www.yorkshirepost.co.uk}}</ref>

===2025===
Rushton played 20 matches for Huddersfield in the 2025 Super League season as the club finished 10th on the table.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/huddersfield-giants-coach-sounds-nrl-warning-as-honest-admission-made-over-2025-shortcomings/|title=Huddersfield Giants coach sounds NRL warning as honest admission made over 2025 shortcomings|website=www.loverugbyleague.com}}</ref>
